turns.human_input: I need to decide whether to take this job offer.
turns.ai_response: Tell me your priorities and constraints, and I can help you compare options.

turns.human_input: Can you compare salary, growth, and remote flexibility for me?
turns.ai_response: Yes. I can help structure the tradeoffs across those dimensions.

turns.human_input: Given that, what would you choose if you were me?
turns.ai_response: I would lean toward the role with better long-term growth and acceptable flexibility.
